title: Make installation on Mac possible
body: Currently I don't see an option to install buildah on Mac. More and more DevOps Enginners are opting Mac. I urge someone to build this for MacOS

comments.body: @kitarp29 thanks for the suggestion, and we'd love to do it, but don't have a willing contributor at the moment.  However, Podman runs on the Mac and the 'podman build' command there is essentially 'buildah build'.  Would that work?

Will give it a try!
Thanks 🫡

Buildah is not a client server tool, it needs to be run on a Linux box, since it requires features like containers and overlayfs storage.

Podman build on a Mac works with a podman service running within a VM (podman-machine), and does builds using Dockerfiles/Containerfiles on the remote machine using buildah inside.

I don't see buildah ever running natively on a MAC.
